chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT AT LARKANA C.P.No.S-966 of 2018 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection "A". 2. For hearing of main case..-.-.-.-. 04.01.2019 Mr. Ashfaque Hussain Abro, advocate holds brief for Mr. Muhammad Afzal Jagirani, counsel appearing for the petitioner. Mr. Amanullah Luhur, State Counsel..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Statements/para-wise comments filed by respondents No.1 & 2 are taken on record and copies whereof are supplied to Mr.Ashfaq Hussain Abro, Advocate holding brief for learned counsel for the petitioner. It is stated by learned State Counsel on behalf of the official respondents that they have no intention to harass the petitioner without due course of law and would protect him in accordance with law. Being faced with the above situation, it was stated by Mr.Ashfaq Hussain Abro, Advocate holding brief for learned counsel for the applicant that under instruction he would not press the instant petition provided the applicant is set at liberty to exhaust the remedy available at law for recovery of his salary. In view of above, the instant constitution petition is disposed of in terms of statement of learned D.P.G for the State with liberty to the applicant to exhaust his remedy in accordance with law for recovery of his salary, if any. J udge
